summary: This plan focuses on an essential kickstart to Python programming fundamentals within your available 2 hours. Since the uploaded materials are related to AI agents and mentorship rather than Python basics, this initial phase will rely on external introductory Python resources to build a foundational understanding.

days.topic: Getting Started with Python: Setup, Syntax, Variables, and Basic Data Types
days.material: External online Python tutorials (e.g., Codecademy, freeCodeCamp, W3Schools Python Tutorial, official Python documentation for beginners). The uploaded AI-related PDFs are not directly applicable to learning core Python syntax but will be valuable later for applying Python in AI.
tasks: Understand Python's role and install Python (if not already).
Write and execute your first 'Hello, World!' program.
Learn about Python syntax basics (indentation, comments).
Explore fundamental data types: integers, floats, strings, booleans.
Practice creating and assigning values to variables.

tips: Focus on hands-on practice: The best way to learn programming is by doing.
Utilize online interactive Python editors if you can't install Python immediately.
Take short breaks to maintain focus during your study session.
For later stages, explore how Python is used in AI/Machine Learning, linking back to your uploaded AI materials.
